Package ui.effect

Class CircleEffect

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.shape.Shape
javafx.scene.shape.Circle
ui.effect.CircleEffect
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CircleEffect extends javafx.scene.shape.Circle
A visual effect that displays a glowing circle on a grid tile.

The effect appears at the center of a tile, scales down, and fades out over a short duration.

This is typically used to highlight tile interactions such as placement, selection, or other transient events.

  • Constructor Details

    • CircleEffect

      public CircleEffect(javafx.scene.paint.Color c, GridPos pos)
      Creates a circular visual effect at the given grid position.
      Parameters:
      c - the color of the effect
      pos - the grid position where the effect will appear

  • Method Details

    • getTransition

      public javafx.animation.Transition getTransition()
      Creates the animation used by this effect.

      The animation scales the circle down while fading its opacity to zero. Both animations run simultaneously.

      Returns:
      a transition that plays the circle's scale and fade animation
